_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.466), RC-T-004 (RC, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.507). Shared vocabulary: [chain, security, supply]. NICE-only terms [prepare, reports] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.909, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Prepare supply chain security reports" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.585 > STS 0.507 (gap +0.078). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [chain, security, supply] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [chain, security, supply]. NICE-only: [prepare, reports]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, knowledge].
